title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.817 - Championship Way designated in Clinton and Clay counties
text:
227.817.  Championship Way designated in Clinton and Clay counties. — The portion of U.S. Highway 169 from State Highway VV continuing to State Highway DD in Clinton and Clay counties shall be designated the "Championship Way".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.  This designation shall expire on December 31, 2022.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
